title: acs <skill>-state.json
description: Per-skill state file in the ticket partition. The append-only `runs` array is the single source of truth for status: runs[-1].status is the current state; pre-hooks gate on it. Status, stop reason, and timestamps are never mirrored at top level. `skill` and `ticket_id` echo the filename/partition deliberately, so the file stays self-describing after archiving.

states.description: The skill's current result data, consumed by the next skill (e.g. specs implemented, tests/coverage, verifier_passed, pr reference). Re-runs update it in place.

findings.description: Anything worth passing on: review findings, user clarifications, gotchas. Latest run's view (replaced on re-run).

handoff_summary.description: Required when status is handed_off: what is done, in flight, next actions, pending decisions.
